name: Synthetix V3
special_mechanism_summary: Synthetix V3 uses a modular vault-pool-market architecture where vaults hold collateral, pools combine vaults and connect to markets, and markets handle position accounting. Perps V3 settles via async orders (keeper-filled at next oracle price), with a velocity-based funding rate model where rate momentum accumulates over time based on skew rather than using a simple skew-proportional formula.
notes: C3' combination potential: async order model creates a window between submission and fill where Pyth oracle price can move, enabling latency arbitrage; velocity funding rate model produces predictable funding rate trajectories exploitable via offsetting positions across time; Pool-Market-Vault separation means strategies creating a skewed market also reduce vault collateral health. sub-threshold accepted by user decision (TVL $40.97M < $50M Ethereum threshold; BSC perp ecosystem gap means this is the best available Ethereum mainnet perp representative).
